summary: Intraoperative neuromonitoring has not been shown in existing literature to improve functional outcomes after open TME; current evidence lacks direct support for this relationship despite discussions about neural preservation during surgery. The answer remains uncertain due to absence of specific studies addressing post-operative function improvement linked directly to neuro-monitoring use.
